description: Private account written by Nahray b. Nissim. 1058. Regarding different matters and people. Some of the lines are erased with a line through and a signature, probably after checking them. Also contains signs in Arabic that seem like “I informed him”. Mentions Nahray’s partners and it seems that he usually worked with a partner and sometimes two partners. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 2, #282) VMR
description_he: רשימה או טבלה מהמאה ה-11. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
